query: SELECT cg.name as grupo, cg.isRequired, ci.name as item, ci.price FROM complementGroups cg JOIN complementItems ci ON ci.groupId = cg.id JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' ORDER BY ci.sortOrder;
